step_by_step_thinking:
Penicillin G is mentioned specifically as the treatment of choice for penicillin-sensitive Staphylococcus aureus causing osteomyelitis (\boxed{C}). There isn't any clear indication suggesting ampicillin over penicillin G among non-penicillinase producing staphylococci.
\boxed{C} Based on the references discussing various aspects of managing Staphylococcus infections, penicillin G is explicitly highlighted as the primary option for penicillin-sensitive Staphylococcus species without penicillinase production.
raw_response:
Penicillin G is mentioned specifically as the treatment of choice for penicillin-sensitive Staphylococcus aureus causing osteomyelitis (\boxed{C}). There isn't any clear indication suggesting ampicillin over penicillin G among non-penicillinase producing staphylococci.
\boxed{C} Based on the references discussing various aspects of managing Staphylococcus infections, penicillin G is explicitly highlighted as the primary option for penicillin-sensitive Staphylococcus species without penicillinase production.\boxed{C}
